name: Composed Citrus Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 Large Navel Oranges - Peeled and Segmented
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together teriyaki sauce, oil, honey, lemon peel, and juice; add ginger.
2. Set aside.
3. Arrange orange and grapefruit segments on 6 plates lined with salad greens.
4. Whisk the dressing again.
5. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of dressing over each salad.
